name: Gemini Omni Flash Preview
description: Gemini Omni Flash Preview is a provisional Google multimodal preview model. Pricing, release date, limits, output modalities, and the full API surface have not been officially published.

page_notice.markdown: This is a provisional preview entry. Google has not published confirmed pricing, release timing, output modalities, limits, or API capabilities for `gemini-omni-flash-preview`; do not use this entry for routing or billing estimates until those details are confirmed.

details.name: catalog_note
details.value: Provisional entry added ahead of official pricing and release documentation. The final modality and capability surface may include more than video generation.
